selections.name: Monsieur Fudge (gb)
selections.reason: Chad Brown shipper dropping significantly in class. Gets aggressive rider Paco Lopez on Monmouth's speed-favoring turf course.

selections.name: Khetam
selections.reason: Consistent speed figures and tactical early speed. Drawn perfectly inside to save ground.

selections.name: Imperial Spy
selections.reason: Solid turf form and benefits from the rail post position bias on this course.

selections.name: Thingamabob
selections.reason: Has shown competitive speed figures in the past and can secure a minor share.

danger_horse.name: Article
danger_horse.reason: Stretching out on turf and could surprise at a big price if allowed an uncontested lead.

selections.name: Ghostwriter
selections.reason: Top speed figures in the field and gets Paco Lopez. Heavily favored by the Monmouth dirt speed bias.

selections.name: Twin Lights
selections.reason: Possesses dangerous early speed and has drawn the highly advantageous rail post.

selections.name: Hillsborough Eight
selections.reason: Consistent maiden-claiming form and should stalk the top two early speed threats.

selections.name: U Dirty Dog
selections.reason: Local runner with decent speed figures that can close late into a fast pace.

danger_horse.name: Giant Groove
danger_horse.reason: First-time starter with a solid pedigree for sprint dirt racing. Watch the board.

selections.name: Just Relax
selections.reason: Cruised in hand last time out. Paco Lopez retains the mount on this highly talented sprinter.

selections.name: Canuto
selections.reason: Vastly improved speed figures recently. Will press the pace from the start.

selections.name: My Mamba
selections.reason: Struggled in recent starts but has back class that makes him a contender in this small field.

selections.name: Awesome For Sure
selections.reason: Completes the small field. Best used underneath in exotic wagers.

selections.name: Aria D
selections.reason: Paco Lopez takes the mount on this speedy filly. Perfect style for a turf sprint.

selections.name: Paynterpretty
selections.reason: Strong early speed figures and draws the rail. Will be the one to catch.

selections.name: Luciana
selections.reason: Consistently hits the board and has shown tactical versatility on turf.

selections.name: Ausplexity
selections.reason: Has shown moderate closing speed and can pass tired horses late.

danger_horse.name: Imagine Erin
danger_horse.reason: Longshot speed threat that could secure a piece of the exotics if left alone early.

selections.name: Stormy Girl
selections.reason: Highly impressive debut winner with elite early speed. The horse to beat on this speed highway.

selections.name: Allenhurst
selections.reason: Extremely consistent local runner who always runs her race. Major threat.

selections.name: Cool Spite
selections.reason: Tactical speed allows her to sit just off the top speed and pounce late.

selections.name: Rock The Rainbow
selections.reason: Struggled in stakes company last time but fits much better with these state-breds.

danger_horse.name: Slick Merlin
danger_horse.reason: Dangerous closer who will benefit if a duel develops between the top two speed horses.

selections.name: Summer Bee
selections.reason: Standout class of the race after scratches. Paco Lopez up makes this a lock.

selections.name: Shakin Loose
selections.reason: Solid turf sprinter who should secure a perfect pocket trip from the rail.

selections.name: Curious Soul
selections.reason: Consistent turf form and fits well in this reduced field.

selections.name: Doctor Doom
selections.reason: Struggling on dirt but has turf pedigree to complete the superfecta.

selections.name: Straight Arrow
selections.reason: Elite route speed figures. Class of the field dropping out of tough New York allowance races.

selections.name: Capitan Danny (chi)
selections.reason: Aggressive front-runner who will love the Monmouth dirt. Paco Lopez up.

selections.name: Racing Driver
selections.reason: Consistent route speed and fits well with these optional claimers.

selections.name: Khozeiress
selections.reason: Solid local form and has shown the ability to hit the board in competitive spots.

danger_horse.name: La Frost
danger_horse.reason: Saves ground along the rail and could close late if the top two duel early.

selections.name: Y'allreadyforthis
selections.reason: Strong turf form and fits perfectly in this spot despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Madam Prosecutor
selections.reason: Possesses tactical early speed and should get a great ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Red Hot Catalina
selections.reason: Competitive turf sprinter stretching out to a mile. Dangerous if left alone.

selections.name: Dakota Cam
selections.reason: Consistent turf runner who always tries and can grab a minor share.

danger_horse.name: Sexpectations
danger_horse.reason: Longshot speed threat that could prove dangerous if allowed to steal an easy lead.
